REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM NOV-12-2025 TO REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTIONS CALENDAR AT DEC-11-2025, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN. THE COURT NOTES THAT DEFENDANT ONLY MOVED FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, NOT FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. SEPARATE STATEMENT APPEARS TO REPEAT THE SAME 10 FACTS 10 TIMES. MOTION IS SUPPORTED ONLY BY DECLARATION OF BRAIN MI. PARAGRAPH 4 OF MI DECLARATION LACKS FOUNDATION. THIS PARAGRAPH IS LISTED AS THE SOLE SOURCE OF EVIDENCE OF FACT 5. NO EVIDENCE WHATSOEVER IS PROVIDED BY THE MOVING PARTY THAT THE FIRE WAS NOT CAUSED BY MI'S "FAMILY, INVITEES, AND GUESTS." FURTHERMORE, THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING THE RESPONSIBLE PARTY FOR THE DAMAGES CAUSED BY FIRE IN THE LEASED UNIT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Text Ruling

Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Set For Trial On Nov-16-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT BRIAN MI MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT;

is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. The Court notes that defendant only moved for summary judgment, not for summary adjudication. Separate Statement appears to repeat the same 10 facts 10 times. Motion is supported only by declaration of Brain Mi. Paragraph 4 of Mi declaration lacks foundation. This paragraph is listed as the sole source of evidence of Fact 5. No evidence whatsoever is provided by the moving party that the fire was not caused by Mi's "family, invitees, and guests." Furthermore, there is a triable issue of fact regarding the responsible party for the damages caused by fire in the leased unit.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
